arguments.name: There are no inputs for this command.

description: 6. Get a list of entities on allow list
name: jask-get-whitelisted-entities

outputs.description: ID of the entity on allow list Jask.Whitelisted.EntityList.Name Name of the entity on allow list
outputs.name: Jask.Whitelisted.EntityList.Id

outputs.description: Username of the entity on allow list Jask.Whitelisted.EntityList.ModelId The modelID of the entity on allow list
outputs.name: Jask.Whitelisted.EntityList.UserName

outputs.description: Time of the entity on allow list Jask.Whitelisted.EntityList.Metadata.TotalCount Number of entities on allow list
outputs.name: Jask.Whitelisted.EntityList.Timestamp
